sources.type: long-form Authority Magazine interview (career advice format with differentiation context)
podcast article with embedded interview quotes (Emerj 'AI in Business')

research_notes.selected_from: Doc 1 (English TL;DR) — research-recommended candidate; ~2,200 words claimed verified by web_fetch on Authority Magazine
research_notes.verification: Authority Magazine + Emerj fetched 2026-05-09. Combined: ~7 quotes from Authority Mag (~250w) + 2 quotes from Emerj (~200w) = 9 verbatim quotes total.
research_notes.linkedin: Headline 'CEO & Co-Founder at Aquant'; About absent (marker pattern).
research_notes.track_decision: Multi-source experiment 2026-05-09. Originally depth (single Authority Magazine), now adds Emerj as source-02 to test whether expanded source bundle raises the synthesis ceiling. Service Council and other sources blocked; first-party blog content excluded as non-independent. 2 independent sources is below the original ≥3 spec; experiment proceeds anyway because the empirical question is whether adding sources affects the ceiling, not whether the count meets the spec.
research_notes.why_aquant_for_breadth_test: 1) 100% axis_match on depth (signal-clean baseline); 2) P09=8 in 1 of 3 depth runs (potential ceiling break that more sources may consolidate); 3) two genuinely independent sources accessible vs Buildots (only 1) and Finout (only 1).
